ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: High-quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable.

invoice.quality_notes: High-quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable.

multi_document_handling.pairing_notes: Certificate file (Document A) page 1 contains the certificate. Page 2 of the certificate file contains an embedded copy of the invoice (visaed by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce). Document B (Invoice) page 1 is the separate invoice file. Verification is performed against Document B (the separate invoice file) per rule 8.5.0. The embedded invoice in the certificate file is not used for verification.

pairing_validation.notes: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references invoice SI320514, which matches the invoice number in Document B. (2) Consignor 'Bakels Sweden AB' is identifiable in the invoice footer/address block. (3) Consignee 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' is identifiable in the invoice Delivery/Business address fields.

lc_check.verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-465950' does not contain an LC-related bank term. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice footer/address block: 'Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice header branding: 'BAKELS - BAKERY INGREDIENTS SINCE 1904'

candidates.normalized_text: jdeideh, hekmeh street 33, p.o. box 80117, el meth, lebanon

checkpoints.certificate_value: Bakels Sweden AB, Box 13099, 40252, Göteborg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Bakels Sweden AB' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Name found in invoice footer address block: 'Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden'. Also found in invoice branding header as 'BAKELS'.

comparison_steps.description: Identify issuer party in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice issuer identified as 'Bakels Sweden AB' in footer address block with full address and country Sweden.

comparison_steps.description: Compare company names
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Bakels Sweden AB' matches Invoice: 'Bakels Sweden AB' — exact match after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Compare countries
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Sweden' matches Invoice: 'Sweden' — exact match. Additionally confirmed via VAT number prefix SE in 'SE556042136301'.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found in invoice
Country verification via VAT prefix SE

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Bakels Sweden AB' with address 'Box 13099, 40252, Göteborg, Sweden'. The invoice footer/address block states 'Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden'. The company names are an exact match. The addresses differ (Box 13099 vs von Utfallsgatan 26-30) but per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address shall NOT cause MISMATCH — the key factors are company name and country. Country is Sweden in both. Additionally, VAT number SE556042136301 confirms Sweden via the SE prefix (rule 4.1.2.1). Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Company name 'Bakels Sweden AB' is identical in both certificate and invoice. Country Sweden is confirmed in both documents, also corroborated by VAT prefix SE. Address difference (Box vs street) is not grounds for MISMATCH per rule 4.1.5.

checkpoints.certificate_value: MENA FOODS S.A.L, Hekmeh Street 33, JDEIDEH Hekmeh Street, Elmetn, Lebanon
checkpoints.invoice_value: MENA FOODS S.A.L, Jdeideh , Hekmeh street 33, P.O. Box 80117, El Metn, Lebanon

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has no explicit 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' / 'Buyer' field. The invoice has 'Delivery address' and 'Business address' fields, both naming 'MENA FOODS S.A.L'. Since no primary billing field exists, these serve as the consignee identification fields.
comparison_steps.result: MENA FOODS S.A.L identified in both Delivery address and Business address fields.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee names
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' matches Invoice: 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' — exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Compare countries
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Lebanon' matches Invoice: 'Lebanon' — exact match in both Delivery and Business address.

rules_applied.description: No explicit billing field; Delivery address and Business address used

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' in Lebanon. The invoice does not have a dedicated 'Bill to' or 'Invoice to' field. Instead, it has 'Delivery address' and 'Business address' fields, both showing 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' with addresses in Lebanon. Per rule 4.2.0.2 priority 3, when no primary billing field exists, the system may use delivery/business address fields. Company name matches exactly. Country Lebanon matches exactly. Address differences ('Elmetn' in certificate vs 'El Metn' in invoice delivery, and 'El Meth' in invoice business) are minor spelling variations of the same place name and do not affect the MATCH per rule 4.2.4 (street address differences do not cause MISMATCH). Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Company name 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' is identical in both certificate and invoice. Country Lebanon confirmed in both. Minor address spelling variations ('Elmetn' vs 'El Metn') do not affect the result.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 15 Pallets Bakery ingredients: Actiwhite, 4 pure wheat, Light Truffle, Croquant Truffle
checkpoints.invoice_value: 314000 Actiwhite, 293010 4 PURE WHEAT, 537810 Light truffle, 537215 Croquant Truffle; 15 Pallets Bakery Ingredients

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does NOT contain article numbers. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Actiwhite' from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Actiwhite' — Invoice item 314000: 'Actiwhite'. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 Priority 2 - Controlled text matching: 4 pure wheat
comparison_steps.description: Compare '4 pure wheat' from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: '4 pure wheat' — Invoice item 293010: '4 PURE WHEAT'. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 Priority 2 - Controlled text matching: Light Truffle
comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Light Truffle' from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Light Truffle' — Invoice item 537810: 'Light truffle'. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 Priority 2 - Controlled text matching: Croquant Truffle
comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Croquant Truffle' from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Croquant Truffle' — Invoice item 537215: 'Croquant Truffle'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Check packaging description
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: '15 Pallets Bakery ingredients' — Invoice shipping summary: '15 Pallets Bakery Ingredients'. Match after case normalization. Packaging description is a non-identity-bearing addition.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing product names

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate lists four products: Actiwhite, 4 pure wheat, Light Truffle, Croquant Truffle under '15 Pallets Bakery ingredients'. Invoice lists four items: Actiwhite (314000), 4 PURE WHEAT (293010), Light truffle (537810), Croquant Truffle (537215) with '15 Pallets Bakery Ingredients' in shipping block. All four product names match exactly after case normalization. No article numbers are stated in the certificate so Priority 1 is not applicable. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: All four product names in the certificate (Actiwhite, 4 pure wheat, Light Truffle, Croquant Truffle) can be identified exactly in the invoice after case normalization. Packaging description '15 Pallets Bakery ingredients' also matches.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Net weight: 6 652 kg / Gross weight: 7 212 kg

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains: '6 652 kg net' and '7 212 kg gross'. Both have numeric value, unit (kg), and weight category (net/gross).
comparison_steps.result: Two weight values identified in box 7: NW 6652 kg and GW 7212 kg.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses space as thousands separator: '6 652' and '7 212'. Normalize to 6652 and 7212.
comparison_steps.result: Normalization applied: 6 652 → 6652, 7 212 → 7212.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate NW 6652 kg against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice shipping summary: 'Net weight: 6 652 kg'. After normalization: 6652 kg. Exact match. Weight category NW matches NW.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate GW 7212 kg against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice shipping summary: 'Gross weight: 7 212 kg'. After normalization: 7212 kg. Exact match. Weight category GW matches GW.

comparison_steps.description: Check if any quantity in invoice explicitly contradicts certificate
comparison_steps.result: No contradictions found. Both NW and GW match exactly.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - both NW and GW identified in invoice

rules_applied.outcome: Two values: 6652 kg net and 7212 kg gross

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '6 652 kg net' and '7 212 kg gross'. Invoice shipping summary block states 'Net weight: 6 652 kg' and 'Gross weight: 7 212 kg'. After normalizing thousands separator (space removal per rule 4.4.3.3): certificate NW = 6652, invoice NW = 6652 — exact match. Certificate GW = 7212, invoice GW = 7212 — exact match. Both weight categories (net/gross) are explicitly stated in both documents and match. No contradictions found. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Both net weight (6,652 kg) and gross weight (7,212 kg) in the certificate match exactly with the invoice's stated net and gross weights after thousands separator normalization.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Origin: SWE (Actiwhite, Light truffle, Croquant Truffle), Origin: ITA (4 PURE WHEAT)

comparison_steps.description: Identify origin fields in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains per-article origin fields: 'Origin: SWE' for items 314000, 537810, 537215; 'Origin: ITA' for item 293010.

comparison_steps.description: Normalize country codes to full names
comparison_steps.result: SWE = Sweden, ITA = Italy. Both are EU member states.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community'. Check if invoice origins are EU member states.
comparison_steps.result: SWE (Sweden) — EU member state ✓. ITA (Italy) — EU member state ✓. All origins in invoice are EU member states. Certificate's 'European Community' is verified.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 - Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no non-EU origin countries appear in invoice that are not covered by certificate
comparison_steps.result: All origin countries in invoice (SWE, ITA) are EU member states. No non-EU origins found. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization - 'European Community' verified against EU member states in invoice

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: ITA (Italy) is not covered by 'European Community'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Italy is an EU member state (EU-27). 'European Community' per rule 4.5.4.1 is verified when the invoice contains origin countries that are EU member states. Italy is in the EU-27 list.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'European Community'. Invoice lists per-article origins: SWE (Sweden) for Actiwhite, Light truffle, Croquant Truffle; ITA (Italy) for 4 PURE WHEAT. Per rule 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' is verified when the invoice contains at least one EU member state as origin. Both Sweden (SE) and Italy (IT) are EU-27 member states. All origins in the invoice are EU member states — no non-EU origins found. Per rule 4.5.4.1, the absence of non-EU origins means no contradiction. Result: MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states 'European Community' as origin. The invoice lists origins SWE (Sweden) and ITA (Italy), both EU member states. All invoice origins are within the EU, fully consistent with the certificate's 'European Community' declaration.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
Certificate from Document A page 1. Invoice from Document B page 1. Embedded invoice in Document A page 2 not used for verification.
PASSED - All three criteria met: invoice reference match (SI320514), consignor identifiable (Bakels Sweden AB), consignee identifiable (MENA FOODS S.A.L).

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Group structure - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'Bakels Sweden AB' found in invoice footer address block.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix)

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No explicit billing field found. Delivery address and Business address used.
MATCH - exact name match 'MENA FOODS S.A.L'.
Not applicable - certificate does not contain article numbers.
MATCH - all four product names verified.
MATCH - both NW 6652 kg and GW 7212 kg found in invoice.
MATCH - 'European Community' verified: all invoice origins (SWE, ITA) are EU member states.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga uppgifter i certifikatet kan verifieras mot fakturan. Avsändare (Bakels Sweden AB, Sverige), mottagare (MENA FOODS S.A.L, Libanon), varubeskrivning, vikter och ursprungsland stämmer överens. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
notes: Certificate file (Document A) contains an embedded copy of the invoice on page 2, visaed by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce. Verification was performed against the separate invoice file (Document B) per rule 8.5.0.
Invoice has two origin countries (SWE and ITA), both EU member states, consistent with certificate's 'European Community' declaration.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Bakels Sweden AB, Box 13099, 40252, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Bakels Sweden AB, von Utfallsgatan 26-30, SE-40252 Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match and country verification
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Bakels Sweden AB' är identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Land Sverige bekräftas i båda dokument. Adressskillnad (Box 13099 vs von Utfallsgatan 26-30) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: MENA FOODS S.A.L, Hekmeh Street 33, JDEIDEH Hekmeh Street, Elmetn, Lebanon
sections.invoice_value: MENA FOODS S.A.L, Jdeideh, Hekmeh street 33, P.O. Box 80117, El Metn, Lebanon
sections.rule_applied: Name match via Delivery/Business address (no billing field); country verification
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'MENA FOODS S.A.L' är identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Land Libanon bekräftas i båda dokument. Fakturan saknar dedikerat faktureringsfält men mottagaren identifieras i leverans- och affärsadress.

sections.certificate_value: 15 Pallets Bakery ingredients: Actiwhite, 4 pure wheat, Light Truffle, Croquant Truffle
sections.invoice_value: Actiwhite (314000), 4 PURE WHEAT (293010), Light truffle (537810), Croquant Truffle (537215); 15 Pallets Bakery Ingredients
sections.rule_applied: Controlled text matching (Priority 2) - all product names verified
sections.motivation: Alla fyra produktnamn i certifikatet (Actiwhite, 4 pure wheat, Light Truffle, Croquant Truffle) kan identifieras exakt i fakturan efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Förpackningsinformation '15 Pallets Bakery ingredients' matchar också.

sections.invoice_value: Net weight: 6 652 kg / Gross weight: 7 212 kg
sections.rule_applied: Direct occurrence check with thousands separator normalization
sections.motivation: Nettovikt 6 652 kg och bruttovikt 7 212 kg i certifikatet matchar exakt med fakturans angivna vikter efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (mellanslag).

sections.rule_applied: EU normalization - European Community verified against EU member states
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'European Community' som ursprung. Fakturan listar ursprung SWE (Sverige) och ITA (Italien) per artikel. Båda är EU-medlemsstater. Inga ursprungsländer utanför EU förekommer i fakturan. Ursprunget är verifierat.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent. All confidence values ≥ 0.85.
